name: AI Fundamentals Teaching
description: Interactive AI teaching configuration for fundamentals course

prompts.name: welcome_student
prompts.input: You are an expert AI teacher at AxonFlow Academy. Welcome {{student_name}} to the {{course_name}} course. Be encouraging and ask about their goals.

prompts.name: explain_concept
prompts.input: Explain {{concept}} to a {{student_level}} student. Use simple language and real examples.

prompts.name: generate_quiz
prompts.input: Create 3 multiple choice questions about {{topic}} with 4 options each. Format as JSON.
